description: Retrieval quality CI gates for HybridRAGService baseline set (v2: +Precision@K, +MRR)

gates._comment_latency: latency is machine/cold-start dependent (BGE-M3 load + pgvector network), NOT a quality signal. Set to a CI-safe ceiling so it never flakes the gate; recall/ndcg/mrr/citation are the real quality bars.
